name: Grape Leaves Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and prepare the grape leaves by removing any tough stems.
2. Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion and red bell pepper; sauté until softened.
3. Add uncooked rice, salt, black pepper, and ground coriander to the pot. Stir to combine.
4. Pour in vegetable stock and dry white wine. Bring mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low and add cauliflower head, eggplant, and grape leaves. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
6. Taste soup and adjust seasoning if needed.
7. Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
